$comment: CANONICAL WAVE METER REGISTRY — the single machine-readable source of record. The README table, pricing.schema.json (meter + topology_meters enums) and billing-config.schema.json (name enum) are DERIVED from / checked against this file by validate-meters.py. To add or change a meter, edit HERE first. Every list_price_usd MUST clear cogs_usd (the dearest covered-backend cost); the validator fails the build otherwise. COGS verified against official Cloudflare / AWS / Anthropic / OpenAI pricing pages 2026-06-02 (task #89 6-agent research); names match the executed live Stripe migration (ADR docs/meter-registry-alignment.md, #38). 'billing' = how the meter charges: per_unit (FLAT cents = list_usd×100), passthrough (Metronome sums amount_usd, rate_cents=100; the per-unit price is baked into amount_usd by the emitter), or none (unpriced).

decisions.cogs_source: BYOK control-plane: WAVE bills routing only; customer keys + inference never transit WAVE, so WAVE pays ~$0 backend per decision (just edge compute).
decisions.rates_note: account = authenticated/off-chain meter rate; x402 = 10x gas-covering on-chain per-call (~$0.001 Base gas); overage = beyond-quota (>= account, never sold at a loss); premium = dispatch_plus tier.

storage_gb.cogs_source: AWS S3 Standard $0.023/GB-mo (dearest covered); CF R2 Standard $0.015 real backend, $0 egress (2026-06-02).

bandwidth_gb.cogs_source: CF Stream delivery @~2.5 Mbps $0.053/GB (dearest path); R2/Workers egress $0 real. Anchored a left-digit below AWS DTO $0.09 (2026-06-02).

compute_minutes.cogs_source: Lambda H100 GPU-minute $0.0415 (dearest covered, $2.49/hr); CF Containers 1 vCPU+2 GiB ~$0.0015 real. Token/GPU inference belongs to ai_tokens (2026-06-02).

stream_minutes.cogs_source: api.video / AWS IVS output $0.0025/min (dearest fallback); CF Stream Video Delivered $0.001/min real, egress bundled (2026-06-02). FLOW meter (delivered), distinct from storage_minutes (STOCK).

storage_minutes.cogs_source: CF Stream storage $0.005/min-mo, single backend (original-duration only; renditions do not multiply) (2026-06-02). STOCK meter (media held), distinct from stream_minutes (FLOW).

ai_tokens.cogs_source: GPT-5.5 blended 3:1 in:out = $11.25/1M = $0.00001125/token (dearest covered); Sonnet 4.6 $6/1M, CF Workers AI local ~$0.42/1M (2026-06-02). $15 per 1M tokens. WAVE-hosted inference only — distinct from BYOK decisions.
ai_tokens.price_note: $15 per 1,000,000 tokens (= $0.000015/token). Unit is per-TOKEN (resolves the legacy '1K tokens' ambiguity). Billed via amount_usd passthrough (rate_cents=100), so the per-token price is applied by the emitter, not a Metronome FLAT rate.

api_calls.cogs_source: Generic API-call meter — no live price set; margin invariant SKIPPED until priced.
